messages.content:
All well here & hope the same with you!

Find attached Sept closing month sales and stocks for Wood watches. As advised in your previous,  we have activated 30% discount on Wood watches, we are confident this would help us in boosting sales in October Month.
best sentence

We are pleased to inform you that we have attached the sales and stocks report for Wood watches for the month of September. We have taken your advice into consideration and have implemented a 30% discount on Wood watches. We believe this discount will greatly contribute to boosting sales in the month of October.
Thank you for the update. We are glad to see that the 30% discount on Wood watches has been activated. We are confident that this initiative will have a positive impact on sales in October.

As discussed in our yesterday’s meeting find attached ageing stocks available in KSA market, please review & advise, so that we can do necessary action accordingly.

best sentence

Please find attached the report on ageing stocks available in the KSA market, as discussed in our meeting yesterday. We kindly request you to review the report and provide guidance on the necessary actions to be taken.
All well here & hope the same with you!
Thank you for your kind wishes. I am an AI language model, so I don't have feelings, but I am here to assist you. How can I help you today?
I am doing good, how about you?
As an AI, I don't have feelings or physical sensations, but I'm here to assist you with any questions or tasks you have. How can I assist you today?
I am doing good, how about you? best sentence
I'm glad to hear that you're doing well! As an AI, I don't have feelings or physical sensations, but I'm here and ready to help you with anything you need assistance with. How can I assist you today?
Since we are carrying the same SKUs in our full price ONTIME stores, we would recommend you to run 35% off on the attached lines

Thank you for the recommendation. We will review the attached lines and consider implementing a 35% discount on the respective SKUs in our full-price ONTIME stores. We appreciate your input and will take it into consideration when planning our promotional strategies.

Thank you for your quick response, since we are running Buy 1 watch & Get 2nd watch at 50% in our ONTIME stores on these SKU’s, we would request you to rollout 35% off on these lines. However, as and when we start Bazaar( hopefully in 3rd week of October) we can implement Bazaar price across outlet & Ecom and we shall pull these stocks out of full price stores                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 better sentence

Thank you for providing us with additional information. We understand that you are currently running a Buy 1 watch & Get 2nd watch at 50% promotion in your ONTIME stores for these specific SKUs.

Considering this, we will proceed with implementing a 35% off discount on these lines in the full-price stores. However, once the Bazaar starts (anticipated in the third week of October), we will apply the Bazaar price across all outlets and E-commerce platforms. At that point, we will remove these stocks from the full-price stores.

Thank you for your guidance, and we will ensure the necessary actions are taken accordingly.

Thank you for your quick response, since we are running Buy 1 watch & Get 2nd watch at 50% in our ONTIME stores on these SKU’s, we would request you to rollout 35% off on these lines. However, as and when we start Bazaar( hopefully in 3rd week of October) we can implement Bazaar price across outlet & Ecom and we shall pull these stocks out of full price stores                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Better sentence

Thank you for the prompt response. We have taken note that you are currently running a Buy 1 watch & Get 2nd watch at 50% promotion for these specific SKUs in your ONTIME stores. In response to your request, we will proceed with implementing a 35% discount on these lines.

Additionally, we will ensure that once the Bazaar begins, which is anticipated in the third week of October, we will implement the Bazaar price across all outlets and E-commerce platforms. Furthermore, we will coordinate the removal of these stocks from the full-price stores as part of the transition.

Thank you for providing us with this necessary information, and we will ensure the appropriate actions are taken accordingly.

We understand the challenge you are having to change the promo at this point of time, we had short call with Dexter & agreed to add some lines which are having big qty at 50%, so that you can continue with 50% banner. We shall move these lines for our full price stores and you can also tag them as Ecom exclusive. Rest of the sku’s we would request you to go with 35% off.

Find attached file for your easy reference,
best sentence

Thank you for understanding the challenge we are facing in changing the promotion at this stage. We appreciate the discussion you had with Dexter, and we acknowledge the decision to include additional lines with substantial quantities at a 50% discount. This will allow us to continue with the existing 50% banner.

We will proceed with moving these specific lines to our full-price stores and label them as E-commerce exclusive. As for the remaining SKUs, we will implement the recommended 35% discount.

For ease of reference, we have attached the file with the necessary information. Thank you for your cooperation in this matter.

We understand the challenge you are having to change the promo at this point of time, we had short call with Dexter & agreed to add some lines which are having big qty at 50%, so that you can continue with 50% banner. We shall move these lines for our full price stores and you can also tag them as Ecom exclusive. Rest of the sku’s we would request you to go with 35% off.

How to improve the sentence

We understand the challenge of adjusting the promotion at this stage, and we appreciate the discussion you had with Dexter. As per our agreement, we will include certain lines with significant quantities at a 50% discount, allowing us to continue with the 50% banner as planned. These specific lines will be moved to our full-price stores and tagged as E-commerce exclusives. 

Furthermore, we kindly request that the remaining SKUs be discounted at 35% off. 

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation in this matter.
